title: Social Media Intern
description:
Are you the person who says "Wait, let me film this first"? 📸

If your "Screen Time" report is 90% TikTok and IG, and you’re always the one spotting the latest trending audio before it goes viral—we want you! We are looking for a Social Media Intern who is ready to stop scrolling and start creating.
We are a dynamic group of Financial Advisers who know the "finance" part, but we need your creative eye to help us bridge the gap and connect with our audience.

Working Hours

⏰ Monday to Friday | 10am – 6pm

Location

📍 Somerset [Near MRT]

✨ What You’ll Be Doing (The Fun Stuff):

  • Content King/Queen: Brainstorm, shoot, and edit scroll-stopping videos (Reels/TikToks) and graphics.

  • Trend Spotting: Keep us ahead of the curve by identifying the latest memes, sounds, and social movements.

  • Graphic Guru: Use Canva or other mobile design apps to make our brand look aesthetic and professional.

  • Behind the Scenes: Help us plan campaigns, manage postings, and engage with our digital community.

  • Community & Planning: Support the team in scheduling posts and keeping the content calendar organized.

🙌 Who You Are:

  • A Content Enthusiast: You live on TikTok/IG and have a "good eye" for what looks (and sounds) great.

  • Editing Savvy: You know your way around video editing tools like CapCut or other editing apps.

  • Proactive & Bold: You aren’t afraid to pitch a quirky idea or direct us "finance folks" on how to pose or speak on camera!

  • Creative Storyteller: You can write captions that people actually want to read and engage with.

  • Skills-Focused: Currently pursuing or recently completed a background in Marketing, Communications, or simply have a killer portfolio to show us.

  • Bonus: An interest in personal finance or previous content creation experience!

💎 What’s In It For You?

  • Real World Impact: No boring paperwork. You’ll be building a purpose-driven brand and seeing your work go live.
  • Portfolio Gold: Build a portfolio of real-world campaigns that will make your future employers go "Wow."
  • Mentorship: Work closely with experienced "financial folks" and learn the ropes of personal branding in a professional industry.
  • Vibe & Location: Work in a vibrant area (Somerset!) with a team that values creativity over hierarchy.

Ready to Apply? 🎬

Don't just send us a dry PDF! We want to see your creative flair.

  1. Resume: Keep it short and sweet.

  2. Portfolio: If you have one, feel free to include links to your best video edits, TikTok/IG handles, or any past work that shows off your style.

How to reach us?
📱 WhatsApp: 8963 7656 OR 📧 Email: enquiries.arch@gmail.com

postedCompany.description: At ArchFTP, we believe in empowering individuals to achieve their financial goals and secure their future. As a dedicated team under Prudential Financial Advisers Singapore, we focus on financial planning and wealth management, while fostering a professional and collaborative work environment.
postedCompany.name: SCCH HOLDINGS PTE. LTD.
